inventory.name: Minor Mana Elixir
inventory.description: Restores 15 MP (or 15 HP if no mana). A blue-tinged liquid that tingles on the tongue.

inventory.name: Healing Salve
inventory.description: Restores 15 HP gradually. A thick green paste that numbs pain and closes wounds.

inventory.name: Flask of the Basilisk
inventory.description: Roots enemies in a 3x3 area for 3 turns. A petrifying gaze captured in a bottle.

inventory.name: Liquid Gold
inventory.description: +50 Defense, immobile for 10 turns, then gain 100 gold. Drinking molten gold seems foolish, but the reward is worth the risk.

inventory.name: Berserker Brew
inventory.description: +50% damage, -50% defense for 5 turns. A frothing drink that brings out your inner rage.

inventory.name: Scholar's Monocle
inventory.description: Identifies all unidentified items in inventory. A single lens that reveals hidden properties of magical items.

inventory.name: Panacea Ointment
inventory.description: Cures all physical status effects. A waxy salve that smells of healing herbs and soothes all wounds.

head_armor.name: Leather Cap
head_armor.description: A simple leather cap for basic protection. +3 defense.

chest_armor.name: Boiled Leather Tunic
chest_armor.description: Standard leather armor. +5 defense, +2 magic resist.

legs_armor.name: Leather Leggings
legs_armor.description: Simple leather leggings. +4 defense, +1 magic resist.
